summary: Frontend testing of contact form system across all pages. All core contact form features are working correctly. One CRITICAL issue found: /about and /method routes do not exist - app uses /about-me and /how-i-work instead, causing blank pages.

integration_issues.issue: React Router shows 'No routes matched location /about' and 'No routes matched location /method'. App.js routes are /about-me (not /about) and /how-i-work (not /method). The review_request feature tests #7 and #8 reference /about and /method which are blank pages.
integration_issues.priority: MEDIUM - the pages work at correct URLs (/about-me, /how-i-work)

test_results.2_exec_coaching_hero_cta: PASS - Opens modal (not navigating to /contact), pre-selects 'Executive Coaching & Advisory'
test_results.3_exec_coaching_final_cta: PASS - Opens modal with 'Executive Coaching & Advisory' pre-selected
test_results.4_org_advisory_hero_cta: PASS - Opens modal with 'Organizational Advisory' pre-selected
test_results.5_team_facilitation_hero_cta: PASS - Opens modal with 'Leadership Team Facilitation' pre-selected
test_results.6_exec_retreats_hero_cta: PASS - Opens modal with 'Executive Retreats' pre-selected (button: INQUIRE ABOUT RETREATS)
test_results.7_about_hero_cta: PASS (at /about-me) - Opens modal with no pre-selection. NOTE: /about returns blank page (route not defined)
test_results.8_method_hero_cta: PASS (at /how-i-work) - Opens modal. NOTE: /method returns blank page (route not defined)
test_results.10_homepage_hero_panel: PASS - BEGIN THE WORK nav opens hero panel; Escape closes it; click outside closes it
test_results.11_backdrop_click_closes_modal: PASS - Clicking outside form card on backdrop closes modal
test_results.12_form_validation_and_success: PASS - Invalid submit shows red border error state; valid submit (name+email+T&C) shows success screen with 'Thank you, John.'

action_items: Add route aliases: <Route path='/about' element={<About />} /> and <Route path='/method' element={<Method />} /> in App.js so both /about and /about-me (and /method + /how-i-work) work. This ensures the URLs mentioned in the feature spec resolve to the correct pages.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: Routes /about-me and /how-i-work are defined but /about and /method are not. If external links or documentation refers to /about or /method, users will see blank pages. Add alias routes.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 feature requirements pass; the 2 route URLs /about and /method don't exist but the pages work at their actual URLs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All contact form modal behaviors tested and passing. Key finding: route /about = blank (use /about-me), /method = blank (use /how-i-work). Form submission is MOCKED (800ms setTimeout). All service pre-selection, Escape key, backdrop close, and form validation work correctly.
mocked_apis: Form submission via /api/contact is MOCKED - uses 800ms setTimeout, no real backend call
